title: Atzlk MC: Server
description: 1.21.1 NeoForge Tornado Modded SMP w/ ProtoManly's Weather Mod
body:
# mc.atzlk.com - ProtoManly's Weather Mod SMP
mc.atzlk.com is a ProtoManly's Weather Mod Survival SMP! Get started with a Starter Kit & join and create towns with other people. From tornadoes, cyclones, squalls and wildfires this server contains many weather challenges with hundreds of active members in the [discord](https://discord.gg/atzlk), creating towns, countries & civilisations.

ProtoManly's Weather Mod also contains seasons which adds an interesting twist to survival, with tornado seasons, winter snow storms and cyclone season.

- ProtoManly's Weather Mod is required on NeoForge 1.21.1 to play on the server.
- Simple Voice Chat Mod also supported

![Civilisations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aecdca088eb04ddd1dac289b3067e4f4f5059d2.png)
